actions.leaf_title: Add list-units CLI subcommand with domain grouping

revised.title: Re-spec list-units against the stabilized router interface
revised.content:
The failure came from racing the router change. The revised leaf expresses the ordering via depends_on (not a status): implement against the settled router registration hook.

Files: unitconv/cli/list_units.py, tests/test_list_units.py

Acceptance criteria:
- list-units registers via the final router hook
- grouping assertions green

Test expectations: registration + grouping tests in tests/test_list_units.py

actions.rationale: Under-cap failure; revised spec stays inside the strict LeafSpec vocabulary.
